name: myceliadb_enterprise_clean_v1_21_16_blog_public_catalog_reaction_regression_hotfix
changes: Public blog cards now expose comments/likes/dislikes and blog-level reaction forms.
Blog detail pages now include blog-level comments, comment reactions, deletion controls, and a comment form.
Engine now treats target_type=blog comments as blog.comment permission, not forum.comment.
list_blogs/get_blog now return blog-level reaction/comment counters.
Regression test added: another user can comment on and like a public blog.
fixes: Public list_blogs no longer receives injected owner_signature from session-bound reads; Blogs remains public while My Blog remains owner-filtered.
Regression test added for session-bound public blog catalog visibility after blog comments/reactions hotfix.
